recommendations.title: Virus
recommendations.overview: When the crew of an American tugboat boards an abandoned Russian research vessel, the alien life form aboard regards them as a virus which must be destroyed.

recommendations.title: It! The Terror from Beyond Space
recommendations.overview: The first manned expedition to Mars is invaded by an unknown life form, which stows away on the rescue ship.

recommendations.title: Meg 2: The Trench
recommendations.overview: An exploratory dive into the deepest depths of the ocean of a daring research team spirals into chaos when a malevolent mining operation threatens their mission and forces them into a high-stakes battle for survival.

recommendations.title: Dr. Jekyll and Mr. Hyde
recommendations.overview: A doctor's research into the roots of evil turns him into a hideous depraved fiend.

recommendations.title: The Mummy
recommendations.overview: An ancient Egyptian priest named Imhotep is revived when a British archaeological expedition finds his mummy and one of the researchers accidentally reads an ancient life-giving spell. Imhotep escapes from the field site and searches for the reincarn

recommendations.title: The Thing
recommendations.overview: A research team in Antarctica is hunted by a shape-shifting alien that assumes the appearance of its victims.

recommendations.title: Dark Light
recommendations.overview: A woman returns to her family home and discovers it to be inhabited by monsters.

recommendations.title: Shark Attack 3: Megalodon
recommendations.overview: When two researchers discover a colossal shark's tooth off the Mexican coast their worst fears surface - the most menacing beast to ever rule the waters is still alive and mercilessly feeding on anything that crosses its path. Now they must hunt the

recommendations.title: Body Cam
recommendations.overview: As a police officer investigates the gruesome murder of her colleague, she discovers that a mysterious supernatural force is behind it.

recommendations.title: The Burning Sea
recommendations.overview: An oil platform dramatically goes down on the Norwegian coast, and researchers try to find out what happened when they realize this is just the start of something even more serious.
